facebook.caption: Tourists walk through Chợ đêm Phú Quốc once and leave. Locals go back every week. The difference? Knowing what to order, where to sit, and which stalls close early. Grilled seafood, fresh fruit shakes, and street snacks at prices that make no sense for an island this popular. 6,039 reviews and still feels like a real market, not a show. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Into The Blue - Phu Quoc Snorkeling Boat Trip

facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 530 reviews. Not a single one below perfect.

Into The Blue on 100 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is doing something right. Snorkeling boat trips off Phu Quoc with a rating that basically never happens at this scale. Clear water, coral, fish. No resort markup, no crowds bussed in from five hotels.

If you're spending even one day on this island, this is the day trip that earns its spot. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
